name: Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 11 – circular desde Navárniz
region_intro: Mountain biking around Nabarniz, located within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve in Bizkaia, Spain, offers diverse natural landscapes and an extensive network of trails. The region features varied terrains, including high valleys, mountains, and lush indigenous forests like the Oma and Basondo Holm Oak Woods. Mount Illuntzar, a prominent peak at over 700 meters, provides significant elevation gains and panoramic views of the reserve. These features create dynamic and engaging experiences for mountain bikers, from forested singletracks to open paths with varied surfaces. Best mountain bike trails around Nabarniz The most popular mountain bike trail is Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 4 – circular desed Mendata, a 20.6 miles (33.2 km) trail that takes 3 hours 3 minutes to complete. This difficult route features significant elevation changes through the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 11 – circular desde Navárniz, a moderate 12.4 miles (20.0 km) path. This route offers a balanced ride through varied terrain, including forested sections and open views. Local mountain bikers also love the Urdaibai BTT Center Route 2, an 11.8 miles (19.0 km) trail leading through the diverse landscapes of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, often completed in about 1 hour 34 minutes. Mountain biking around Nabarniz is defined by challenging mountainous terrain, extensive forests, and panoramic views. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate paths to more difficult climbs. The routes in Nabarniz are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 80 reviews. More than 600 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Nabarniz's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails can I explore around Nabarniz?
A: You can explore over 100 mountain bike trails around Nabarniz. The region offers a diverse network, with 62 moderate routes and 34 difficult routes, ensuring options for various skill levels.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Nabarniz?
A: While the majority of trails are moderate to difficult, there are 4 easier mountain bike routes available around Nabarniz. These provide a good starting point for less experienced riders to enjoy the beautiful landscapes of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve.

Q: What kind of terrain will I encounter on mountain bike trails near Nabarniz?
A: Mountain biking around Nabarniz features a dynamic mix of terrains. You'll find high valleys, challenging mountain climbs, picturesque brooks, and lush green meadows. The routes often pass through extensive indigenous forests like the Oma and Basondo Holm Oak Woods, offering shaded singletracks and open paths with varied surfaces.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes starting from Nabarniz?
A: Yes, there are several circular mountain bike routes. A popular moderate option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1061924341/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-11-circular-desde-navarniz" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 11 – circular desde Navárniz&lt;/a&gt;, which covers 12.4 miles (20.0 km) through varied terrain. Another challenging circular route is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1061717187/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-4-circular-desed-mendata" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 4 – circular desed Mendata&lt;/a&gt;, a 20.6 miles (33.2 km) trail with significant elevation changes.

Q: What are some notable natural features or landmarks I can see while mountain biking in the area?
A: The region is rich in natural beauty and historical sites. You can encounter the majestic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6628930" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Oma Forest&lt;/a&gt;, known for its painted trees, or the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3921343" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Artzubi Bridge&lt;/a&gt;. The trails also offer panoramic views of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, especially from higher elevations like Mount Illuntzar.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Nabarniz?
A: The mountain bike trails around Nabarniz are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.8 stars from over 80 reviews. Riders frequently praise the challenging mountainous terrain, the extensive forests, and the panoramic views of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve.

Q: Is it possible to access mountain bike trails near Nabarniz using public transport?
A: Nabarniz is situated within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, and while specific public transport links directly to trailheads can vary, the area is generally accessible. For detailed information on bus routes or train services to nearby towns like Gernika-Lumo or Mundaka, it's advisable to check local transport schedules.

Q: Are there any family-friendly mountain bike trails around Nabarniz?
A: While many routes feature significant elevation changes, there are 4 easier trails that could be suitable for families with some mountain biking experience. For a more relaxed ride, look for routes with less elevation gain and smoother surfaces, often found in the lower valley areas or around the edges of the forests.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Nabarniz?
A: The diverse natural landscapes of Nabarniz make it enjoyable for mountain biking across multiple seasons. Spring and autumn generally offer pleasant temperatures and lush scenery. While winter can be ridden, always check local weather forecasts as conditions can vary, especially at higher elevations like Mount Illuntzar.

Q: Are there any specific rules or permits required for mountain biking in the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve?
A: As Nabarniz is located within the protected Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, it's important to respect local regulations to preserve the natural environment. Generally, no specific permits are required for mountain biking on established trails, but riders should always stay on marked paths, avoid disturbing wildlife, and practice Leave No Trace principles. Always check for any updated local guidelines before your ride.

Q: Where can I find parking for mountain biking trails near Nabarniz?
A: Parking availability can vary depending on the specific trailhead. Many routes, especially those part of the BTT Centers, often have designated parking areas in nearby villages or starting points. For example, routes like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1061717187/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-4-circular-desed-mendata" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 4&lt;/a&gt; start from Mendata, which typically offers parking options. It's recommended to check the specific route details on komoot for parking information at your chosen starting point.

Q: Can I find cafes or amenities near the mountain bike trails in Nabarniz?
A: Nabarniz, as the highest village in the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, offers some local amenities. You can often find cafes or small eateries in Nabarniz itself or in nearby towns like Gernika-Lumo or Mundaka, which are common access points for the region's trails. It's a good idea to plan your route to pass through these villages if you wish to refuel or rest.
tips: This is a terrific trail that is quite easy to follow. It is especially nice in spring when the flowers come out. It gets a bit wild in the summer when the vegetation is waist high, but that's part of the adventure!
Nice stretch of path that ascends the hillside alternating clearings and wooded areas through a good track.

Navárniz is at the foot of Mount Iluntzar. It stands at around 360 meters above sea level, making it high enough to have great views of the valley and mountains. It is a beautiful little town that is a good place to start an excursion.
